Package javadraw

Class Line

java.lang.Object
javadraw.Line
All Implemented Interfaces:
DrawableObject
public class Line extends Object implements DrawableObject
Represents a Line on the Screen. Has two positions, referred to as "pos1" and "pos2".

    • move

      public void move(double dx, double dy)
      Move the line (both first and second positions) by a specified dx and dy.
      Specified by:
      move in interface DrawableObject
      Parameters:
      dx - the distance on the x-axis to move as a double
      dy - the distance on the y-axis to move as a double

    • move

      public void move(Location location)
      Move the line (both first and second positions) by a dx and dy pulled from a Location's x and y values.
      Specified by:
      move in interface DrawableObject
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to pull dx and dy from

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(double x, double y)
      Move the line to a new Location. Moves the first position to this Location, bringing the second position to a relative position.
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface DrawableObject
      Parameters:
      x - the x-position to move to as a double
      y - the y-position to move to as a double

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(Location location)
      Move the line to a new Location. Moves the first position to this Location, bringing the second position to a relative position.
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface DrawableObject
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to move to
